metaTitle: Right-Click Context Menu for Table Cells | Tablesmit
metaDescription: Right-click any cell or column header for instant access to sort, merge, auto-fit, insert, and delete actions — without using the toolbar.
heroSubtext: Right-click any cell or column header to access the actions most relevant to where you are in the table. No toolbar hunting — the right options appear exactly where you need them.

benefits.heading: Context-aware actions
benefits.body: The menu shows different options depending on what you right-clicked. Right-click a cell and you see cell actions. Right-click a column header and you see column actions. Only what is relevant appears.

benefits.heading: Auto-fit directly from the menu
benefits.body: Right-click a column header and choose Auto-fit column width — no need to double-click the resize handle. The column snaps to its content width instantly.

benefits.heading: Insert rows and columns in context
benefits.body: Right-click any cell to insert a row above, a row below, a column to the left, or a column to the right — without leaving the cell you are working in.

benefits.heading: Background and text colour per cell
benefits.body: Right-click any cell to change its background colour or text colour individually — without needing to navigate the sidebar colour pickers.

cell.label: Auto-fit column width
cell.description: Sets column width to fit the widest content in the column.

cell.label: Auto-fit row height
cell.description: Sets row height to fit the tallest content in the row.

cell.label: Change cell background
cell.description: Opens a colour picker for the selected cell's background.

cell.label: Change text colour
cell.description: Opens a colour picker for the selected cell's text.

cell.label: Change column type
cell.description: Opens a type selector inline — Text, Number, Currency, Percentage, Date.

cell.label: Insert row above
cell.description: Inserts an empty row above the current row.

cell.label: Insert row below
cell.description: Inserts an empty row below the current row.

cell.label: Insert column left
cell.description: Inserts an empty column to the left of the current column.

cell.label: Insert column right
cell.description: Inserts an empty column to the right of the current column.

cell.label: Cut
cell.description: Cuts the cell content to the clipboard.

cell.label: Copy
cell.description: Copies the cell content to the clipboard.

cell.label: Paste
cell.description: Pastes clipboard content — including smart paste from Excel or Word.

cell.label: Clear cell
cell.description: Empties the selected cell without removing it.

columnHeader.label: Auto-fit column width
columnHeader.description: Fits the column to its widest content.

columnHeader.label: Sort ascending
columnHeader.description: Sorts all rows by this column, A-Z or lowest-to-highest.

columnHeader.label: Sort descending
columnHeader.description: Sorts all rows by this column, Z-A or highest-to-lowest.

columnHeader.label: Change column type
columnHeader.description: Opens the type selector for this column.

columnHeader.label: Change column background
columnHeader.description: Sets a background colour for the entire column.

columnHeader.label: Insert column left
columnHeader.description: Inserts an empty column to the left.

columnHeader.label: Insert column right
columnHeader.description: Inserts an empty column to the right.

steps.heading: Right-click any cell
steps.body: Right-click (or long-press on mobile) on any cell to open the cell context menu. The menu appears at the cursor position.

steps.heading: Or right-click a column header
steps.body: Right-click on a column header (the area showing C1, C2, etc.) for column-specific actions — sorting, auto-fit, and column operations.

steps.heading: Click the action
steps.body: Click any item in the menu to execute it immediately. Colour pickers open inline. The menu closes automatically.

useCases: Inserting a row between two rows without scrolling to the toolbar
Auto-fitting a column width directly from a right-click without using the resize handle
Sorting a column in one right-click while reviewing data
Changing a specific cell's background colour to highlight an anomaly

_codex_notes.note: menuItems is an additional field with 'cell' and 'columnHeader' arrays. Render as two reference panels side by side (or stacked on mobile) — 'On a cell' and 'On a column header'. Each panel is a simple list with label bold and description in text-text-secondary. This replaces the standard steps section — render steps after the menu reference panels.
